## Analyzers (1)

### THOR_Thunderstorm_ScanSample `v0.3.1`
Submits sample to an on-premise THOR Thunderstorm web service and processes the scan result

- **Author:** Florian Roth
- **License:** AGPL-V3
- **Data Types:** `file`
- **Configuration:** [View config](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/analyzers/Thunderstorm/Thunderstorm_ScanSample.json)
